chunks.title: The People's Outcry
chunks.reason: Describes the economic crisis and complaints of the people against their brothers.

chunks.title: Nehemiah's Rebuke and Resolution
chunks.reason: Records Nehemiah's anger, his confrontation with the nobles, their agreement, and the oath taken.

chunks.title: Nehemiah's Governance Compared to Predecessors
chunks.reason: Nehemiah explains his personal sacrifice and contrasts his leadership with previous governors.

chunks.title: Final Prayer for Remembrance
chunks.reason: A short concluding prayer asking God to remember Nehemiah's deeds.
